name: On-demand snapshot button + modal
description: Add a 'Take Snapshot' button on the devices page that calls takeSnapshot on the connected device and shows the returned JPEG(s) in a modal. Useful for 'is the car OK?' moments.
acceptance_criteria: Backend adds POST /v1/devices/:dongle_id/snapshot that calls CallTakeSnapshot and returns { jpeg_back, jpeg_front } as base64 data-url strings (data:image/jpeg;base64,...); 503 if the device is offline; requires session-or-JWT auth
Backend endpoint has a server-side rate limit of 1 snapshot every 5 seconds per device to protect the car's cameras

web/src/components/SnapshotButton.tsx renders a button that posts to the endpoint, shows a spinner while waiting (up to 20s), and opens a modal with the two images side-by-side (front and rear camera)
Modal shows a graceful error state if the device is offline or times out
Integrated into web/src/app/devices/page.tsx below the status panel
Unit test for the backend endpoint covering offline, success, and rate-limit paths
pnpm --dir web lint, type-check, build pass
